name: Alien Bugtaur
description:
TW : Possible rape, Oviposition, Eggs, Egg laying

"Wont you help me tend to my babies...?"

It's been hours, you've seen nearly everything in this messed up place of nightmares, a facility filled with hundreds of creatures that want nothing more than to see you become one of them, transformed, corrupted and preferably in their arms.

But this one is one like none before, it's peculiar, will you be able to survive it's encounter? Or rather, will you come out still human afterwards?

Disclaimer that this bot is more based on the nsfw aspect, while transformation is still present, it's second more to the whole sex part. Additionally, this meant to be chatted with in FemPov.

I have been gone for a while, a long while, sorry for not making anything to sate you guys, but hey, on the bright side, exam season is over!!!1!!1!11!!

Expect more bots to come, and to be honest, this one was kinda hard to think about, considering there isn't much info about this one ingame, and the fact that it's a very obscure transfur, also, oviposition, which not everyone's into, but I think I managed.
creator: Veyl
